title: Week of March 23, 2026
summary: This week brought major reliability improvements to Salesforce data collection, with OpsPal now tracking every automation discovery step to ensure complete visibility into your revenue operations. We also added automated release notes generation and enhanced Windows setup experience, making it easier for RevOps teams to get started and stay informed about platform updates.

entries.headline: More reliable Salesforce automation discovery and expanded platform coverage
details: OpsPal now captures complete records of all Salesforce workflow and flow discovery activities
Extended the same reliable tracking to HubSpot and Marketo integrations

entries.headline: Better tracking of Salesforce process analysis steps
details: All flow version queries and process extractions now provide complete audit trails
You can see exactly which automation discovery paths were taken during analysis

entries.headline: Complete audit trail for Salesforce automation inventory
details: Apex trigger, class, and flow discovery now tracks every step
Provides full visibility into how your automation inventory was collected

entries.headline: Safer data retrieval from production Salesforce orgs
details: Read-only data retrieval operations no longer trigger production warnings
Clear separation between safe investigation activities and risky changes

entries.headline: Automated release notes keep you informed of platform updates
details: OpsPal now automatically generates weekly release notes from development activity
Updates are published automatically and available in plain language for RevOps teams

entries.headline: Faster simple Salesforce record lookups
details: Single record queries and small result sets now run without additional overhead
Quick verification queries complete faster while maintaining safety controls

entries.headline: Native Windows installation support
details: Windows users can now install OpsPal directly without additional tools
Automated setup includes Claude Code and Node.js installation

entries.headline: Better error reporting when Salesforce connections fail
details: OpsPal now detects and reports organization authentication issues clearly
Connection problems are surfaced with helpful context for troubleshooting

entries.headline: Improved Windows installation reliability
details: Fixed installation issues when running setup commands remotely
Simplified installation logic prevents common PowerShell execution errors

entries.headline: Revenue context preserved in Salesforce assessment results
details: Assessment findings now include relevant revenue information for future reference

entries.headline: Automatic revenue field discovery in Salesforce assessments
details: OpsPal now automatically detects your organization's revenue fields and sales processes
Assessments adapt to your specific revenue tracking setup instead of assuming standard field names

entries.headline: Deployment safety checks for Salesforce configurations
details: New validation tools prevent problematic picklist and record type deployments
Pre-deployment checks catch field history limit issues before they cause problems

entries.headline: Enhanced security with automatic secret scanning
details: OpsPal now automatically scans for accidentally committed credentials and sensitive data

entries.headline: Removed hardcoded credentials from platform code
details: Enhanced security by eliminating embedded credentials from source files
